lines.target: Where do you live? — I live in a suburb called Harrow.
lines.base: ¿Dónde vive usted? — Vivo en un barrio de las afueras llamado Harrow.

lines.target: How do you go to work? — I take the tube every morning.
lines.base: ¿Cómo va usted a trabajar ? — Cojo el metro todas las mañanas.

lines.target: Why do you take the train? You've got a car.
lines.base: ¿Por qué coge usted el tren? Usted tiene coche.
lines.pronunciation: uai trein ?...—4 ... tuumách trafik... tuumáni pipól. — 5 etó! ekspensif. — 6 uen du iu ius jur kaar ?...

lines.target: There is too much traffic and there are too many people.
lines.base: Hay demasiada circulación y (hay) demasiada gente.
Y la gasolina es muy cara.

lines.target: When do you use your car? — At week-ends.
lines.base: ¿Cuándo usa usted su coche? — Los fines de semana.

lines.target: We go to the country. We go to Windsor quite often.
lines.base: Vamos al campo. Vamos a Windsor bastante a menudo.
lines.pronunciation: .. tu undsó kuait ren, — 9... satédei... kam? — 10...

lines.target: I'm going there on Saturday. Do you want to come?
lines.base: Voy [a ir] allí el sábado. ¿ Quiere usted venir?

lines.target: Too much traffic; too many cars.
Too much noise; too many people.

gap_candidates.target: How do you go to work? — I take the tube every morning.

There is too much traffic and there are too many people. (2) (3)
When do you use your car? — At week-ends. (4)
We go to the country. We go to Windsor quite often.
I'm going there on Saturday. Do you want to come?
Too much traffic; too many cars.
Too much noise; too many people.
